{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231858571C72D246CEA0374ED603"}"},"total":8957},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7593394970352468760","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"剧情不老气，很新颖，主人公都很形象具体，尤其是王子仁，很有魅力，重情义且有能力，当然他也有搞笑的地方，整本书都很有意思，每个人都有自己的特点，剧情精彩到熬到四五点都不带困得[雀食神作][雀食神作][雀食神作][雀食神作][雀食神作]，爱了爱了[爱慕][爱慕][爱慕]。(文采不好，请见谅[奸笑][奸笑])"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1767978733,"group_id":"7397391565678709822","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NxKjjplbYGuWaYOERp/xARZdxTNrgMZFFvwHV0Axb7TG","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/983bc6b809ff4bf4ab3ac2d107aa68c0~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776792535&x-signature=8wVwM93WBQ2Z787Y%2FhtiB%2FWWipI%3D","user_id":"1555177728116268","user_name":"星若初见"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1555177728116268","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7397391565678709822","book_info":{"abstract":"[种田➕科举➕架空➕轻松向]《爹娘掀桌不干了，我儿也要科举》
王学洲正准备走向人生巅峰时，穿了。
好消息，这辈子父母恩爱，兄弟姐妹和睦。
坏消息，全家正勒紧了裤腰带供大伯读书，家徒四壁，吃糠咽菜。
然而，还没等到他掀桌不干，爹娘率先不干了。
亲娘：“学堂又不是大哥一家开的，凭什么他们去得，咱家孩子去不得？”
亲爹：“我没人疼～我没人爱～我是地里的小白菜～”
王学洲：“阿爷，等我考上秀才，咱家就是族谱都要单开一页，您可是咱们村里头一份儿呢！”
看着撒泼打滚，又横，又会画饼的一家三口，王老头抹把脸，艰难的同意送王学洲去读书了。
——
走科举，点状元，族谱单开一页，谱写《家族功名录》
诛奸佞，搞科技，几位尚书为了他明争暗抢。
户部尚书：“你这搂钱的能力，合该就是我户部的。”
王学洲点头：“好。”
什么？国库缺钱？
赚钱哪有抢钱来得快？抄家抄家抄家！
什么？两位尚书都问我选谁？
我谁都不选，单干行不行？
只是干着干着，我怎么横着走了？
新皇泪眼朦胧：“先生待我比亲爹还好……”
王爷：“先生是我的，你们都得往后排！”
将军儿子：“我的饭碗我来守护！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/2ccc793ea0b2233f37ac3c7b0ca888bb","author":"立身之本","author_id":"","book_id":"7397391565678709822","book_name":"这个状元路子有点野","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#283840","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"20.2万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":273,"name":"历史古代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=273&name=历史古代&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":11,"name":"乡村","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=11&name=乡村&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":832,"name":"科举","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=832&name=科举&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7397391644602942014","read_count":"201893","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"2327366"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.9","serial_count":"1063","tags":"历史古代,乡村,历史,穿越,架空,科举","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/5b8d2dbb6a48045c7486010e7fd3a004~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779447537&x-signature=WDZavRHytVtan61CFqgCxNOrtus%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3913864551346381","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1066"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231858571C72D246CEA0374ED603"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读28小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":19,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":99081,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":19537},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7452212978596807449","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"我第一次看关于科举考试的小说，超级好看，本以为看几章就看不下去了，一口气看到200多章根本停不下来，不管是男主幼儿时在村里的章节，还是考试认识的同窗学友，师长，很多小角色人物都有该出现的意义，每个人物的个性，可见作者下笔如有神，我超级喜欢，很多搞笑内容，一点也不枯燥，期待后面的内容，才看到丑蛋考上状元[偷笑]","text_exts":[{"e":49,"s":43,"text":"根本停不下来","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%A0%B9%E6%9C%AC%E5%81%9C%E4%B8%8D%E4%B8%8B%E6%9D%A5&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774263537374ED603%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227452212978596807449%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227397391565678709822%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%A0%B9%E6%9C%AC%E5%81%9C%E4%B8%8D%E4%B8%8B%E6%9D%A5%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1735109655,"group_id":"7397391565678709822","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5ApcIVXivY6r9Y618BkPwLR+SAN8Y4JiMnemvtVU0nJ","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/8b91e01a7b0242389b43128fe854e4b7~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"3694799407297822","user_name":"爱吃品味豆腐的凡灵"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3694799407297822","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7397391565678709822","book_info":{"abstract":"[种田➕科举➕架空➕轻松向]《爹娘掀桌不干了，我儿也要科举》

on":8869,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":66406,"reply_count":2,"show_pv":26558},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7508699362986722072","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"有一说一，符合古代现实环境，描写比较真实，没有不切实际的各种发明，无敌超六边形战士主角。
古代思想与现代思想分寸把握得很好。
行文流畅不水文，评为精品。
目前单女主后期不知道，这方面看作者只是起推进作用感情戏后期应该较少，毕竟在古代官职在一定程度上，上升也需要看是否成家，且补足这方面的空缺部分。

猜测一波，五皇子登基后应该还得背叛主角，先帝将死前曾要五皇子发誓不得相信任何人。
